title: Pale Dark Oak Leaves
description: Deep and dense dark oak leaves with a pale, muted white tone, adding a unique, shadowy elegance to dark forests.
body:
**Dark Oak Leaves**

Dark oak leaves reimagined with a muted, pale white tone that adds depth and character to shadowy forested areas. The combination of pale highlights and rich texture creates a balance between darkness and elegance, perfect for atmospheric builds.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
